title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Security Guard Act, 1986. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 16th October, 1986, vide notification No. S.O. 737(E), dated 16th October, 1986, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
